MARTEN: I've placed a request for help a: MARTEN: I've placed a request for help at our community center just a few days back.

Ah, so your name is \\PN then...?: Ah, so your name is \PN then...?

\\c[6]We can determine that the Void ope: \c[6]We can determine that the Void opened up during the Calamity.

MARTEN: The void is a very dangerous pla: MARTEN: The void is a very dangerous place.
I'm sure you've heard that people who fa: I'm sure you've heard that people who fall in, don't come out?
Well, that's a half-truth. It is possibl: Well, that's a half-truth. It is possible to crawl out of the void if you fall close enough to the exit.
That being said, if you fall too far fro: That being said, if you fall too far from the exit, you may find yourself lost in it forever.
Before I continue, are you familiar with: Before I continue, are you familiar with the concept of a Mystery Dungeon?
MARTEN: Good to know! The Voidal Chasm i: MARTEN: Good to know! The Voidal Chasm is actually a Mystery Dungeon.
A Mystery Dungeon is a labyrinth that ca: A Mystery Dungeon is a labyrinth that can change its formation each time you enter.
So it's impossible to create maps, or pl: So it's impossible to create maps, or plan out a route beforehand.
The Voidal Chasm is a Mystery Dungeon.
At least, part of it is. The first three: At least, part of it is. The first three floors of the Voidal Chasm are always the same.
But if you go any deeper, you'll enter a: But if you go any deeper, you'll enter a labyrinth you cannot escape from.
Lastly, the Voidal Chasm is not only a d: Lastly, the Voidal Chasm is not only a dungeon, but a parasite.
People who find themselves lost in the d: People who find themselves lost in the dungeon sometimes feel some degree of sickness.
That's because the area is actively drai: That's because the area is actively draining your life force.
The chasm seems to cling onto living bei: The chasm seems to cling onto living beings so that it can sustain itself.
For that reason, if you stay in the area: For that reason, if you stay in the area for too long,\c[6] you'll lose everything about yourself.
It will drain your energy, your personal: It will drain your energy, your personality, your memories, and everything else in between.
But it will never cause someone to die... That's the scary part.
In this place, you will not die from old: In this place, you will not die from old age, you will not die from illness...
It will keep you alive and have you roam: It will keep you alive and have you roam for eternity. A fate worse than death, if you ask me.
MARTEN: Now that you've gotten that enti: MARTEN: Now that you've gotten that entire lecture from me, I want you to see just what the Void is capable of.
